title.zh: Toto 17" X 14" Oval Undermount Bathroom Sink, Cotton White

title.th: Toto 17" X 14" Oval Undermount Bathroom Sink, Cotton White
title.vi: Toto 17" X 14" Oval Undermount Bathroom Sink, Cotton White
title.ar: Toto 17" X 14" Oval Undermount Bathroom Sink, Cotton White

description.en:
Elevate Your Bathroom with the TOTO LT569#01 17″ × 14″ Oval Undermount Bathroom Sink — Cotton White

A clean, rimless oval that slips neatly under the counter, the TOTO LT569#01 gives small and mid-size baths a timeless, easy-to-clean upgrade. The generously wide basin (17″ × 14″) with a concealed front overflow supports ADA installations when mounted at the proper height. Vitreous china construction resists stains and everyday wear, and the included mounting hardware and template simplify a precise fit. For stone tops, add TOTO sealing kit THU410 (sold separately).

  • Brand: TOTO
  • MPN: LT569#01
  • Type: Undermount oval bathroom sink (undercounter lavatory)
  • Size/Capacity: Basin 17″ W × 14″ D; overall 19-1/4″ W × 16-1/4″ D × 7-1/2″ H
  • Material/Finish: Vitreous china, Cotton White
  • Performance: Concealed front overflow; ADA-compliant installation when mounted per guidelines
  • Connections/Fit:1-1/4″ O.D. drain; undermount installation; THU410 sealing kit recommended for marble/granite (sold separately)
  • Dimensions: Cutout/template provided; verify counter reveal per manual
  • Included: Sink, mounting hardware, installation template (sealing kit for stone tops sold separately)
  • Certifications: ADA (when installed per ANSI A117.1 clearances)
  • Warranty: One-year limited (manufacturer)

Everyday Performance You Can See

The LT569’s 17″ × 14″ bowl provides comfortable hand-washing space without crowding compact vanities, and the concealed front overflow keeps the look clean from the user’s view.

Durable Materials, Easier Care

Fired vitreous china offers a smooth, glossy surface that resists staining and wipes down quickly—ideal for busy family baths and light-commercial restrooms.

Installer-Friendly Undermount

TOTO includes a paper template and mounting hardware to speed layout and drilling. For stone counters (granite/marble), use TOTO THU410 sealing kit to ensure a proper bond and seal.

Sized Right For Your Vanity

With overall dimensions of 19-1/4″ W × 16-1/4″ D × 7-1/2″ H, the LT569 fits many 24″+ vanities while leaving room for faucet supply lines and a standard 1-1/4″ drain. Always confirm with the template before cutting.

ADA-Ready When Installed Correctly

Meet ADA/ANSI A117.1 requirements by setting counter height and front setback per guidance—ideal for accessible single-user and shared restrooms.

Reliable Drain Compatibility

A standard 1-1/4″ O.D. drain opening pairs with common grid or pop-up assemblies, making it easy to match your faucet line and finish.

description.en:
Elevate Your Space with the TOTO LT579G#12 Rendezvous Oval Undermount Sink — Sedona Beige, CEFIONTECT

Give your vanity a smooth, easy-care upgrade with the TOTO Rendezvous LT579G#12. This oval undermount lavatory delivers a clean, rimless look with a concealed front overflow, while TOTO’s CEFIONTECT® glaze helps the vitreous china surface stay smoother and easier to clean. The warm Sedona Beige (#12) finish pairs naturally with brushed, bronze, and chrome fixtures. A paper template and mounting hardware simplify layout and installation; use the recommended sealing kit for stone tops per the manual.

  • Brand: TOTO
  • MPN: LT579G#12
  • Type: Oval undermount (undercounter) bathroom sink
  • Size/Capacity: Comfortable oval bowl for everyday use (see template for exact bowl size)
  • Material/Finish: Vitreous china with CEFIONTECT® glaze; color Sedona Beige (#12)
  • Performance: Concealed front overflow; ultra-smooth, easy-clean surface
  • Connections/Fit: Standard 1-1/4″ O.D. drain; undermount installation
  • Dimensions: Overall and cutout are template-dependent (confirm reveal before cutting)
  • Included: Sink, installation template, and mounting hardware (stone-top sealing kit sold separately)
  • Certifications/Compliance: ASME A112.19.2 / CSA B45.1; ADA-capable when installed per ANSI A117.1
  • Warranty: 1-year limited (manufacturer)

Durable Materials, Easier Care

Fired vitreous china finished with CEFIONTECT® helps resist buildup and makes routine cleaning faster—ideal for busy family baths and guest spaces.

Everyday Comfort You Can Feel

The oval bowl offers comfortable hand-washing space without crowding the deck, and the concealed front overflow keeps the user view clean and uncluttered.

Installer-Friendly Undermount

Arrives with a paper template and hardware to speed layout and drilling. For granite or marble, follow TOTO’s instructions and use the recommended sealing kit for a proper bond.

Sized Right For Modern Vanities

The undercounter design frees up deck space and fits common vanity sizes; verify cabinet clearances for the trap and a standard 1-1/4″ drain assembly.

Accessible When Mounted Correctly

Can meet ADA requirements when installed to compliant counter height and knee-clearance dimensions—see ANSI A117.1 and the installation guide.

Warm, Versatile Finish

TOTO’s Sedona Beige complements warm stones and metal finishes, making coordination with faucets and accessories effortless across the bath.

description.en:
Refresh Your Space with the TOTO LT641#12 Dartmouth 18-3/4″ × 13-3/4″ Oval Undermount Sink — Sedona Beige

Give your vanity a clean, timeless update with the TOTO Dartmouth LT641#12. This oval undermount lavatory pairs a smooth, rimless look with a comfortable 18-3/4″ × 13-3/4″ bowl and a concealed front overflow to keep the deck tidy. Fired vitreous china in warm Sedona Beige wipes down easily and coordinates with brushed, bronze, and chrome fixtures. A paper template and mounting hardware help streamline installation; use the recommended sealing kit for stone tops as noted in the manual.

  • Brand: TOTO
  • MPN: LT641#12
  • Type: Oval undermount (undercounter) bathroom sink
  • Size/Capacity: Bowl approx. 18-3/4″ W × 13-3/4″ D (overall/cutout: see template)
  • Material/Finish: Vitreous china, Sedona Beige (#12)
  • Performance: Concealed front overflow; smooth, easy-clean glaze
  • Connections/Fit: Standard 1-1/4″ O.D. drain; undermount installation
  • Dimensions: Use included template to confirm cutout and reveal (layout-dependent)
  • Included: Sink, mounting hardware, and installation template (stone-top sealing kit sold separately)
  • Certifications/Compliance: ASME A112.19.2 / CSA B45.1; ADA-capable when installed per ANSI A117.1
  • Warranty: 1-year limited (manufacturer)

Everyday Comfort You Can Feel

The Dartmouth’s generously sized oval bowl supports comfortable handwashing and daily routines, while the hidden overflow preserves a clean, uncluttered look from the user’s view.

Durable Materials, Easier Care

High-gloss vitreous china resists staining and routine wear, so the basin stays bright with simple, non-abrasive cleaning—ideal for busy family baths and guest spaces.

Installer-Friendly Undermount

Arrives with a paper template and hardware to speed layout and drilling. For granite or marble, follow TOTO’s instructions and use the recommended sealing kit for a lasting bond and seal.

Sized Right For Modern Vanities

The undermount design frees up deck space and fits common vanity sizes; verify cabinet clearances for the trap and a standard 1-1/4″ drain assembly.

Accessible When Mounted Correctly

Can meet ADA requirements when installed to compliant counter height and knee/forward clearances— see ANSI A117.1 and the installation guide.

Warm, Versatile Finish

TOTO’s Sedona Beige coordinates beautifully with warm stones and brushed or bronze metals for a cohesive bath palette.

title.zh: Toto Wall-Mount Bathroom Sink, Single Hole in Cotton White - LT307#01

title.ar: Toto Wall-Mount Bathroom Sink, Single Hole in Cotton White - LT307#01

description.en:
Outfit Your Space with the TOTO LT307#01 Commercial Wall-Mount Sink — Single-Hole, Cotton White

Give restrooms a clean, durable upgrade with the TOTO LT307#01 wall-hung lavatory. Sized at 20-7/8″ W × 18″ D, it features an anti-splash rim, high backsplash, and a concealed front overflow to keep the deck tidy. The single-hole deck pairs with compact faucets for simple, reliable handwashing in commercial and light-residential spaces. A wall hanger is included to speed installation and support.

  • Brand: TOTO
  • MPN: LT307#01
  • Type: Wall-mount lavatory, single faucet hole
  • Size/Capacity: Overall 20-7/8″ W × 18″ D; bowl approx. 14-3/4″ W × 10-1/8″ D
  • Material/Finish: Vitreous china, Cotton White (#01)
  • Performance: Anti-splash rim, high backsplash, concealed front overflow
  • Connections/Fit:1-1/4″ drain opening; single faucet hole; punching for concealed arm carrier; wall hanger included
  • Dimensions: Overall height approx. 11-1/8″ (back height); see spec sheet for clearances
  • Included: Sink and wall hanger (faucet & drain not included)
  • Certifications/Compliance:ADA-compliant when installed per guidelines; ASME A112.19.2 / CSA B45.1
  • Warranty: 1-year limited (manufacturer)

Everyday Performance You Can Feel

The high back and anti-splash rim help keep water where it belongs, while the concealed overflow preserves a clean look that’s easy to maintain in busy restrooms.

Durable Materials, Easier Care

Fired vitreous china resists staining and routine wear, so staff can wipe surfaces clean quickly without harsh scrubbing—ideal for schools, offices, and multi-unit facilities.

Installer-Friendly Design

The lav ships with a wall hanger and is punched for use with concealed arm carriers. Follow TOTO’s installation manual for mounting, leveling, and sealing steps.

Sized Right For Compact Rooms

At 20-7/8″ × 18″, the LT307#01 fits tight alcoves and corridor restrooms while still providing a comfortable 14-3/4″ × 10-1/8″ bowl for handwashing.

ADA-Ready When Installed Correctly

Mount at compliant heights and maintain knee/forward clearances to meet ADA and local code requirements—perfect for shared and accessible restrooms.

Simple Faucet & Drain Pairing

The single-hole deck accepts a standard single-handle faucet, and the 1-1/4″ outlet works with common grid or pop-up drains for fast spec and stocking.

description.en:
Upgrade your bathroom with the sleek and modern TOTO LT221#01 Atherton Undermount Lavatory Sink, expertly crafted from durable vitreous china for long-lasting performance. This 21-3/8" x 16-3/8" rectangular sink features a smooth, easy-to-clean surface and minimalist design that fits seamlessly into a wide range of bathroom vanities. Ideal for both residential and commercial applications, the LT221#01 offers a clean undercounter installation that maximizes countertop space while maintaining elegance.

  • Undermount Installation – Clean undercounter design enhances countertop space and creates a seamless, modern look
  • Spacious Rectangular Basin – 21-3/8 x 16-3/8 size with ample washing area and sleek, contoured shape
  • Premium Vitreous China – Durable, non-porous surface resists stains, scratches, and fading over time
  • Elegant Cotton White Finish – Classic white color coordinates beautifully with most bathroom decors
  • Overflow Drain Included – Integrated overflow prevents water spills and enhances safety
  • Easy to Maintain – Smooth surface makes cleaning effortless with regular non-abrasive cleaners
  • Trusted TOTO Quality – Backed by a global leader in bathroom innovation and performance

title.ar: Toto LT542G#01 19" x 12-3/8" Rectangular Undermount Bathroom Sink with CeFiONtect: Cotton White

description.en:
Refresh Your Bathroom with the TOTO LT542G#01 19″ × 12-3/8″ Rectangular Undermount Sink — Cotton White, CEFIONTECT

Give compact vanities a clean, easy-care upgrade with the TOTO LT542G#01. This rectangular undermount lav pairs a sleek, rimless look with a space-efficient 19″ × 12-3/8″ bowl—great for powder rooms and narrow countertops. TOTO’s CEFIONTECT® glaze helps the vitreous china surface stay smoother and easier to clean, while the concealed front overflow keeps the aesthetic tidy. A paper template and mounting hardware simplify layout and installation; use the recommended sealing kit for stone tops as noted in the manual.

  • Brand: TOTO
  • MPN: LT542G#01
  • Type: Rectangular undermount (undercounter) bathroom sink
  • Size/Capacity: Bowl approx. 19″ W × 12-3/8″ D (overall/cutout: see template)
  • Material/Finish: Vitreous china with CEFIONTECT® glaze; color Cotton White (#01)
  • Performance: Concealed front overflow; smooth, easy-clean surface
  • Connections/Fit: Standard 1-1/4″ O.D. drain; undermount installation
  • Dimensions: Use included template to confirm cutout and reveal (layout-dependent)
  • Included: Sink, mounting hardware, and installation template (sealing kit for stone tops sold separately)
  • Certifications/Compliance: ASME A112.19.2 / CSA B45.1; ADA-capable when installed per ANSI A117.1
  • Warranty: 1-year limited (manufacturer)

Durable Materials, Easier Care

Fired vitreous china with TOTO’s CEFIONTECT® micro-smooth glaze helps resist buildup so routine cleaning takes less effort—ideal for busy households and guest baths.

Everyday Comfort In A Compact Footprint

The 19″ × 12-3/8″ basin maximizes usable bowl space without crowding smaller counters, delivering comfortable hand-washing in powder rooms and narrow vanities.

Clean, Concealed Overflow

A front overflow hidden from view preserves the minimalist look while providing protection against accidental overfilling during everyday use.

Installer-Friendly Undermount

Arrives with a paper template and mounting hardware to speed layout and drilling. For granite or marble, follow TOTO’s instructions and use the recommended sealing kit.

Sized Right For Modern Vanities

The compact rectangle sits neatly in many 24″+ cabinets, leaving room for faucet supplies and a standard 1-1/4″ drain assembly beneath the counter.

Accessible When Mounted Correctly

Can meet ADA requirements when installed to the proper counter height and knee-clearance dimensions—see ANSI A117.1 and the installation manual.

Bright, Versatile Finish

TOTO’s Cotton White pairs easily with chrome, nickel, or matte black faucets and accessories for a fresh, coordinated bath design.

description.en:
Refresh Your Vanity with the TOTO LT531.8#01 Promenade Rectangular Drop-In Sink — 8″ Centers, Cotton White

Give your bath a timeless update with the TOTO Promenade rectangular self-rimming sink, model LT531.8#01. Designed for 8″ widespread faucets, this drop-in lavatory offers a clean, traditional look with a generous rectangular bowl that’s comfortable for daily use. Durable vitreous china in Cotton White resists stains and wipes clean easily, while the raised rim helps contain splashes. A straightforward drop-in installation makes it a smart choice for refresh projects and new tops alike.

  • Brand: TOTO
  • MPN: LT531.8#01
  • Type: Self-rimming (drop-in) rectangular bathroom sink for 8″ widespread faucets
  • Size/Capacity: 8″ (203 mm) three-hole faucet spread; standard lavatory bowl
  • Material/Finish: Vitreous china, Cotton White (#01)
  • Performance: Integrated overflow; smooth, easy-clean glaze
  • Connections/Fit:1-1/4″ O.D. drain connection; three-hole deck for widespread faucet
  • Dimensions: Overall and bowl dimensions see TOTO spec sheet/template (counter cutout is template-dependent)
  • Included: Sink; installation template (hardware needs are layout-dependent)
  • Certifications/Compliance: ASME A112.19.2 / CSA B45.1; ADA capability depends on installation height/clearances
  • Warranty: 1-year limited (manufacturer)

Classic Style, Everyday Comfort

The Promenade’s rectangular bowl provides comfortable hand-washing space with a traditional raised rim that helps keep splashes on the deck—not on the floor. Its clean lines pair well with both vintage and transitional bath designs.

Easy, Drop-In Installation

Designed for a standard countertop cutout, this self-rimming sink installs from the top for a fast upgrade. Use the included template and follow the manual to confirm the opening and faucet hole spacing.

Sized For 8″ Widespread Faucets

The factory 8″ three-hole deck works with your favorite widespread faucet trim—perfect for matching cross or lever handles in the Promenade style.

Durable Vitreous China

A high-gloss vitreous china surface resists staining and everyday wear, making it easy to wipe clean and keep looking new with minimal maintenance.

Countertop Friendly

The self-rimming edge provides a neat transition to the counter surface and can help mask small imperfections in existing cutouts during remodels.

Code-Ready Confidence

Built to recognized plumbing standards. For ADA applications, mount at compliant heights and maintain required clearances per ANSI A117.1.

Plan The Cutout

Always trace and cut using the TOTO template and confirm reveal preferences before cutting. Dimensions and mounting method may vary with countertop materials.

title.zh: California Faucets 9050ZB-PC ZeroDrain Pop-Down Style Lavatory Drain: Chrome

title.th: California Faucets 9050ZB-PC ZeroDrain Pop-Down Style Lavatory Drain: Chrome
title.vi: California Faucets 9050ZB-PC ZeroDrain Pop-Down Style Lavatory Drain: Chrome
title.ar: California Faucets 9050ZB-PC ZeroDrain Pop-Down Style Lavatory Drain: Chrome

description.en:
California Faucets ZeroDrain® Pop-Down Lavatory Drain – Polished Chrome

Bring a touch of brilliance to your next bathroom project with the award-winning California Faucets ZeroDrain® Pop-Down Style Lavatory Drain. This innovative bathroom sink drain offers a flawless, minimalist look that reimagines traditional sink drainage. Finished in a stunning, highly reflective Polished Chrome, this drain delivers a mirror-like shine that coordinates perfectly with both contemporary and classic fixtures. It's the ideal blend of high-end design and practical engineering, offering reliable performance and exceptional value for residential or commercial installations alike.

  • Brand: California Faucets
  • MPN: 9050ZB-PC
  • Finish: Polished Chrome
  • Type: Pop-Down Lavatory Drain
  • Flange Diameter: 2-1/4"
  • Tailpiece: 1-1/4" OD x 4"
  • Application: Universal for sinks with or without overflow
  • Max Installation Thickness: 2"

Revolutionary "Barely There" Design

Say goodbye to lift rods and pop-up eyesores. The ZeroDrain® Polished Chrome drain is the world's first pop-down drain, engineered to sit completely flush with the sink when open. This patented mechanism creates a seamless look that upgrades the overall visual appeal of your lavatory, improves water flow, and makes cleaning effortless. Simply press to seal and press again to release, allowing water to drain freely and efficiently. This is a smart, sophisticated upgrade that brings lasting value and style.

Universal Compatibility for Streamlined Installation

Designed for versatility and efficiency, this California Faucets drain is a single, universal solution for both overflow and non-overflow sink applications. Its flexible compatibility simplifies your inventory and installation process—ideal for busy projects and smart renovations. The 2-1/4" diameter flange and secure fit for up to 2" installation thickness provide quick, leak-proof results across a variety of sink styles. It's a dependable, go-to option for remodels or new builds.

Additional Features

  • Brass trim, body, nut, and tailpiece
  • Stopper flush with flange in open position
  • Removable stopper allows for easy cleaning & hair removal
  • Easy installation
  • A single unit for both overflow and less overflow applications
  • 2-1/4" diameter upper flange
  • 1-1/4" OD X 4" tailpiece (total below sink length is 6-1/2"; length is 7" when thin sink spacer is used)
  • Maximum installation thickness 2"

Enhance your bathroom’s sophistication with the California Faucets ZeroDrain® Pop-Down Style Lavatory Drain. This industry-leading bathroom sink drain delivers cutting-edge minimalist style that changes the way you approach sink drainage. The elegant Satin Nickel finish offers a subtle, brushed sheen that resists fingerprints and water spots, making it a beautiful match for a wide range of modern or transitional fixtures. Enjoy the high-end look of innovative design, combined with the practical reliability your projects demand.

description.en:
A 1-1/4" x 8", 17 gauge Slip Joint Tailpiece Extension Tube for standard P-Traps.

  • Compatible with all Mountain Plumbing lavatory drains.
  • Also compatible with most other manufacturer�s lavatory drains.
  • Attaches to existing 1 1/4" tailpiece.
  • Fully plated for exposed applications.
  • Can be cut to size.
  • 17 Gauge Brass
  • Champagne Bronze Finish
  • Spec Sheet

title.ar: Oatey 39239 1.5" 6 DFU AAV Installation Kit 1-1/2" P-trap, 6" extension tube, PVC threaded adapter & deep box flange

description.en:
By eliminating the need for a branch vent, Oatey Sure-Vent Air Admittance Valves (AAVs) provide the ideal venting solution for island sinks, remote bathroom groups and remodel jobs. Sensitivity to pressure changes, combined with its ability to consistently open and close, is what distinguishes the Oatey Sure-Vent AAV from all others.

  • Every fixture needs a trap and every trap needs a vent. To prevent sewer gases from being released in a home, a trap is required. A vent keeps the sewer and atmospheric pressures equalized allowing water to drain freely.
  • Sure-Vent AAV's provide the ideal venting solution for island sinks, remote bathroom groups and remodeling jobs by eliminating the need to be connected directly into the stack vent.
  • Sure-Vent AAV's are more economical than installing vent pipes in new construction because they reduce the added need for materials and labor.
  • At zero pressure the Sure-Vent AAV is sealed, ready to react to pressure changes. The Sure-Vent AAV will not allow sewer gas to enter the structure.
  • When water is turned on, a pressure change of -0.01 psi (-0.25" H2O) will cause the Sure-Vent AAV to open, allowing airflow from the room through the protective screening, past the seal and into the DWV system as the arrows indicate. When the water is turned off and pressure equalized, the Sure-Vent AAV returns to the closed zero pressure position.
  • The Sure-Vent AAV seals at 0 psi and above indefinitely. The figure shows the Sure-Vent AAV in a sealed position blocking sewer gasses. When pressure subsides, the Sure-Vent AAV returns to the zero pressure position.
  • For use as a secondary vent
  • One size approved to handle up to 2" vent pipe
  • Opens/closes as needed by building's plumbing system
  • Complies to ASSE Standard 1050 and 1051

title.en: Toto LT597G#12 Dantesca Oval Undermount Bathroom Sink with CeFiONtect: Sedona Beige
title.zh: Toto LT597G#12 Dantesca Oval Undermount Bathroom Sink with CeFiONtect: Sedona Beige
title.id: Toto LT597G#12 Dantesca Oval Undermount Bathroom Sink with CeFiONtect: Sedona Beige
title.th: Toto LT597G#12 Dantesca Oval Undermount Bathroom Sink with CeFiONtect: Sedona Beige
title.vi: Toto LT597G#12 Dantesca Oval Undermount Bathroom Sink with CeFiONtect: Sedona Beige
title.ar: Toto LT597G#12 Dantesca Oval Undermount Bathroom Sink with CeFiONtect: Sedona Beige

description.en:
Transform Your Bathroom with the TOTO LT597G#12 Dantesca 21-1/4″ × 17-1/4″ Oval Undermount Sink — Sedona Beige, CEFIONTECT

Give your bath a clean, timeless upgrade with the TOTO Dantesca LT597G#12. This oval undermount lavatory pairs a generous bowl with a sleek rimless look and a concealed front overflow. The CEFIONTECT® glaze helps the surface stay smoother and easier to clean, while ADA-capable installation makes it a smart choice for shared and accessible spaces. A paper template and mounting hardware are included for a precise fit, with an optional sealing kit for stone countertops.

  • Brand: TOTO
  • MPN: LT597G#12
  • Type: Oval undermount (undercounter) bathroom sink
  • Size/Capacity: Overall 21-1/4″ W × 17-1/4″ D × 7-1/2″ H; bowl approx. 19″ × 15″
  • Material/Finish: Vitreous china with CEFIONTECT® glaze; color Sedona Beige (#12)
  • Performance: Concealed front overflow; ADA-compliant when installed per ANSI A117.1
  • Connections/Fit:1-1/4″ O.D. drain; undermount installation
  • Dimensions: Use included template; confirm reveal before cutting countertop
  • Included: Sink, installation template, and mounting hardware (for wood tops)
  • Certifications: ASME A112.19.2 / CSA B45.1; ADA-capable (installation-dependent)
  • Warranty: 1-year limited (manufacturer)

Durable Materials, Easier Care

Vitreous china with TOTO’s CEFIONTECT® glaze creates an ultra-smooth surface that helps resist buildup, reducing cleaning effort while keeping the basin looking new.

Everyday Comfort You Can Feel

The 19″ × 15″ bowl provides comfortable hand-washing space without crowding smaller vanities. A concealed front overflow keeps the look clean from the user’s view.

Installer-Friendly Undermount

Arrives with a paper template and mounting hardware for wood countertops. For granite or marble, use TOTO sealing kit THU410 (sold separately) to ensure a proper bond and seal.

Sized Right For Your Vanity

The 21-1/4″ × 17-1/4″ footprint works well on 24″+ vanities, leaving room for faucet supplies and a standard 1-1/4″ drain assembly beneath.

Accessible When Installed Correctly

Can meet ADA requirements when mounted to the correct counter height and clearance per ANSI A117.1—ideal for shared and multi-user baths.

Finish That Complements Warm Palettes

TOTO’s Sedona Beige pairs naturally with warm stone tops and brushed or bronze metal finishes for a cohesive design across the bath.

title.en: Oatey Dearborn Universal Pop Down Sink Drains in Brushed Nickel - 1000000451
title.zh: Oatey Dearborn Universal Pop Down Sink Drains in Brushed Nickel - 1000000451
title.id: Oatey Dearborn Universal Pop Down Sink Drains in Brushed Nickel - 1000000451
title.th: Oatey Dearborn Universal Pop Down Sink Drains in Brushed Nickel - 1000000451
title.vi: Oatey Dearborn Universal Pop Down Sink Drains in Brushed Nickel - 1000000451
title.ar: Oatey Dearborn Universal Pop Down Sink Drains in Brushed Nickel - 1000000451

description.en:
The Dearborn Universal Pop Down Sink Drain delivers a clean, modern look with a flush-to-basin fit and sleek, tarnish-resistant finishes that elevate any bathroom space. Its unique single-piece design works with both overflow and non-overflow sinks and eliminates common leak paths for long-term reliability. With easy push-to-open, lift-to-clean functionality and tool-free installation, it's a streamlined solution that performs beautifully and installs in minutes. Dearborn is known for providing superior quality and products designed with the plumber in mind.

  • Pop Down bathroom sink drain for overflow and non-overflow sinks
  • Patented, solid brass flange sits flush with sink basin when in the open position
  • Single-piece body eliminates potential leak paths
  • Quick, easy and secure hand-tighten installation without channel locks or wrenches
  • Push to open and close and lift to clean for easy functionality and maintenance
  • Corrosion and tarnish resistant chrome finish complements any bathroom style
  • Jewelry-friendly design helps block items from falling down the drain
  • Comes with two washers to accommodate any sink thickness
  • Durable polymer construction offers long-lasting use
  • Fits popular bathroom sink styles, including pedestal, vessel, drop-in and under-mount sinks

title.en: Oatey 43583 3 or 4 In. PVC General Purpose Drain with 5 In. Stainless Steel Strainer
title.zh: Oatey 43583 3 or 4 In. PVC General Purpose Drain with 5 In. Stainless Steel Strainer
title.id: Oatey 43583 3 or 4 In. PVC General Purpose Drain with 5 In. Stainless Steel Strainer
title.th: Oatey 43583 3 or 4 In. PVC General Purpose Drain with 5 In. Stainless Steel Strainer
title.vi: Oatey 43583 3 or 4 In. PVC General Purpose Drain with 5 In. Stainless Steel Strainer
title.ar: Oatey 43583 3 or 4 In. PVC General Purpose Drain with 5 In. Stainless Steel Strainer

description.en:
The Oatey 3 in. or 4 in. PVC General Purpose Drain with 5 in. Stainless Steel Screw-Tite Strainer is for indoor or outdoor draining applications where a waterproofing membrane is not required. The drain body is constructed from durable PVC plastic. The screw-on stainless steel strainer is removable to provide easy access to the drain line for cleaning. Oatey products have earned the trust of plumbing professionals for over 100 years.

  • General purpose PVC drain
  • Fits over 3 in. or inside 4 in. DWV pipe
  • Includes 4 in. screw-tite stainless steel strainer
  • Solvent weld inside 4 in. PVC Sch. 40 pipe or over 3 in. PVC Sch. 40 pipe
  • For use indoors or outdoors
  • Only 1-3/16 Inch high for tight spaces
  • Removable 4-Inch stainless steel strainer

description.en:
Optimize Your Vanity with the TOTO LT542G#12 19″ × 12-3/8″ Rectangular Undermount Sink — Sedona Beige, CEFIONTECT

Give your vanity a sleek, easy-care upgrade with the TOTO LT542G#12. This rectangular undermount lavatory pairs a clean, rimless look with a compact 19″ × 12-3/8″ bowl—great for tight vanities and powder rooms. TOTO’s CEFIONTECT® glaze helps the vitreous china surface stay smoother and easier to clean, while the concealed overflow maintains a tidy aesthetic. A paper template and mounting hardware streamline installation; use the TOTO sealing kit for stone tops as directed in the manual.

  • Brand: TOTO
  • MPN: LT542G#12
  • Type: Rectangular undermount (undercounter) bathroom sink
  • Size/Capacity: Bowl approx. 19″ W × 12-3/8″ D (overall/cutout: see template)
  • Material/Finish: Vitreous china with CEFIONTECT® glaze; color Sedona Beige (#12)
  • Performance: Concealed front overflow; smooth, easy-clean surface
  • Connections/Fit: Standard 1-1/4″ O.D. drain; undermount installation
  • Dimensions: Use included template to confirm cutout and reveal (layout-dependent)
  • Included: Sink, mounting hardware, and installation template (sealing kit for stone tops sold separately)
  • Certifications/Compliance: ASME A112.19.2 / CSA B45.1; ADA-capable when installed per ANSI A117.1
  • Warranty: 1-year limited (manufacturer)

Durable Materials, Easier Care

Vitreous china fired with TOTO’s CEFIONTECT® micro-smooth glaze helps resist buildup so routine cleaning takes less effort—ideal for busy households and guest baths.

Everyday Comfort In A Compact Footprint

The 19″ × 12-3/8″ basin maximizes usable bowl space without crowding small countertops, delivering comfortable hand-washing in powder rooms and narrow vanities.

Clean, Concealed Overflow

A front overflow hidden from view preserves the minimalist look while providing protection against accidental overfilling during everyday use.

Installer-Friendly Undermount

Arrives with a paper template and mounting hardware to speed layout and drilling. For granite or marble, follow TOTO’s instructions and use the recommended sealing kit.

Sized Right For Modern Vanities

The compact rectangle sits neatly in many 24″+ cabinets, leaving room for faucet supplies and a standard 1-1/4″ drain assembly beneath the counter.

Accessible When Mounted Correctly

Can meet ADA requirements when installed to the proper counter height and knee-clearance dimensions—see ANSI A117.1 and the installation manual.

Warm, Versatile Finish

TOTO’s Sedona Beige complements warm stones and brushed or bronze metals, making it easy to coordinate with faucets and accessories across the bath.

description.en:
Elevate Your Bathroom with the TOTO LT931#01 Lloyd Rectangular Undermount Sink — Cotton White

Give your vanity a clean, modern upgrade with the TOTO Lloyd LT931#01. This rectangular undermount lavatory delivers a sleek, rimless look with a generous, easy-to-use basin and a concealed front overflow to keep the aesthetic tidy. Durable vitreous china in Cotton White wipes clean quickly and pairs with a wide range of faucet finishes. Use the included template to confirm your cutout and reveal before installation.

  • Brand: TOTO
  • MPN: LT931#01
  • Type: Rectangular undermount (undercounter) bathroom sink
  • Size/Capacity: Rectangular basin for everyday hand-washing (exact bowl size: see template)
  • Material/Finish: Vitreous china, Cotton White (#01)
  • Performance: Concealed front overflow; smooth, easy-clean surface
  • Connections/Fit: Standard 1-1/4″ O.D. drain; undermount installation
  • Dimensions: Overall and cutout dimensions are template-dependent (verify prior to cutting)
  • Included: Sink and installation template (mounting method varies by countertop; see manual)
  • Certifications/Compliance: ASME A112.19.2 / CSA B45.1; ADA capability depends on installation height/clearances
  • Warranty: 1-year limited (manufacturer)

Everyday Performance You Can Feel

The rectangular bowl maximizes usable space for comfortable hand-washing and daily routines, while the hidden overflow keeps the user view clean and uncluttered.

Durable Materials, Easier Care

High-gloss vitreous china resists staining and routine wear, so the basin stays bright with simple, non-abrasive cleaning.

Installer-Friendly Undermount

The included template speeds layout and helps you set the preferred counter reveal. Follow the manual for proper support and sealing based on your countertop material.

Sized Right For Modern Vanities

The low-profile, undercounter design frees up deck space and fits well in common vanity sizes; confirm cabinet clearances for the trap and a standard 1-1/4″ drain.

Clean, Coordinated Finish

TOTO’s Cotton White complements chrome, nickel, or matte black faucets and accessories, making it easy to coordinate the entire bath.

Accessible When Installed Correctly

Can meet ADA requirements when mounted to compliant counter heights and knee-clearance dimensions—see ANSI A117.1 and the installation guide.

description.en:
The perfect half-sphere of this vessel sink makes it a true stand-out for the bath. At 17 inches in diameter, the Morro offers both functionality and effortless style. This one-of-a-kind sink is artisan-crafted of NativeStone: an innovative blend of cement and natural jute fiber. NativeStone delivers resilience for heavy-duty tasks, in conjunction with a refreshingly easy cleanup.

The groundbreaking NativeStone Collection of bathroom sinks is a mesmerizing combination of contemporary artistry and innovation. Handmade by artisans using a sustainable blend of natural materials, these eco-friendly sinks are exceptional in their lighter weight, one-of-a-kind coloration, and extraordinary stain, scratch, and crack resistance.

title.vi: Mountain Plumbing MT2000-2/CPB Round Style Decorative Bottle Trap Polished Chrome
title.ar: Mountain Plumbing MT2000-2/CPB Round Style Decorative Bottle Trap Polished Chrome

description.en:
Our round style decorative lavatory bottle trap for exposed applications. The Round Style Decorative Bottle Trap is used with glass, vessel, or wall-hung lavatory sinks as well as pedestals or consoles where there is exposed plumbing applications. Unique, upscale, and sophisticated, this is the perfect trap to use for that designer look!

  • Fully plated drain with 17 gauge tube
  • 1-1/4″ x 1-1/4″ trap with 11″ drain tube
  • Includes flange and reducer seal to attach 1-1/4″ drain tube to 1-1/2″ wall drain
  • Drain body is 4-3/4″ tall
  • Patented feature eliminates long drain tubes from closing water seal

Round Style Decorative Bottle Trap includes clean-out plug.

*Please Note: The MT2000 Round Style Decorative Bottle Trap has been replaced by the MT2000-2

title.en: Oatey Dearborn Universal Pop Down Sink Drains in Matte Black - 1000000452
title.zh: Oatey Dearborn Universal Pop Down Sink Drains in Matte Black - 1000000452
title.id: Oatey Dearborn Universal Pop Down Sink Drains in Matte Black - 1000000452
title.th: Oatey Dearborn Universal Pop Down Sink Drains in Matte Black - 1000000452
title.vi: Oatey Dearborn Universal Pop Down Sink Drains in Matte Black - 1000000452
title.ar: Oatey Dearborn Universal Pop Down Sink Drains in Matte Black - 1000000452

description.en:
The Dearborn Universal Pop Down Sink Drain delivers a clean, modern look with a flush-to-basin fit and sleek, tarnish-resistant finishes that elevate any bathroom space. Its unique single-piece design works with both overflow and non-overflow sinks and eliminates common leak paths for long-term reliability. With easy push-to-open, lift-to-clean functionality and tool-free installation, it's a streamlined solution that performs beautifully and installs in minutes. Dearborn is known for providing superior quality and products designed with the plumber in mind.

  • Pop Down bathroom sink drain for overflow and non-overflow sinks
  • Patented, solid brass flange sits flush with sink basin when in the open position
  • Single-piece body eliminates potential leak paths
  • Quick, easy and secure hand-tighten installation without channel locks or wrenches
  • Push to open and close and lift to clean for easy functionality and maintenance
  • Corrosion and tarnish resistant chrome finish complements any bathroom style
  • Jewelry-friendly design helps block items from falling down the drain
  • Comes with two washers to accommodate any sink thickness
  • Durable polymer construction offers long-lasting use
  • Fits popular bathroom sink styles, including pedestal, vessel, drop-in and under-mount sinks

Its unique single-piece design works with both overflow and non-overflow sinks and eliminates common leak paths for long-term reliability. With easy push-to-open, lift-to-clean functionality and tool-free installation, it's a streamlined solution that performs beautifully and installs in minutes. Dearborn is known for providing superior quality and products designed with the plumber in mind.

  • Pop Down bathroom sink drain for overflow and non-overflow sinks
  • Patented, solid brass flange sits flush with sink basin when in the open position
  • Single-piece body eliminates potential leak paths
  • Quick, easy and secure hand-tighten installation without channel locks or wrenches
  • Push to open and close and lift to clean for easy functionality and maintenance
  • Corrosion and tarnish resistant chrome finish complements any bathroom style
  • Jewelry-friendly design helps block items from falling down the drain
  • Comes with two washers to accommodate any sink thickness
  • Durable polymer construction offers long-lasting use
  • Fits popular bathroom sink styles, including pedestal, vessel, drop-in and under-mount sinks

title.ar: Oatey 1-1/2 in. x 6 in. Slip Joint Extension Tube for Drain Connection - P9792

description.en:
Slip-joint extension tube used to bridge gaps in tubular drain installations. The 6 in. length provides added reach between sink tailpieces, traps, and branch connections. Installs quickly with a slip-joint nut and washer for a reliable, serviceable seal.

  • Size: 1-1/2 in. OD x 6 in. length
  • For tubular sink drain assemblies (kitchen or bath)
  • Slip-joint connection for fast, tool-light installation
  • Smooth interior helps maintain flow and reduce buildup
  • Trim-to-fit capability for custom lengths if needed
  • Compatible with common slip-joint nuts and washers (sold separately)
  • Corrosion-resistant construction for long service life

  • Includes two matching escutcheons for a clean, finished look
  • Made from high-quality materials offering reliable performance and durability

title.ar: Native Trails Hana in Polished Copper - CPS442

description.en:
This 20" copper bathroom sink brings elegance and artistry to any bathroom design. As a copper drop-in sink, Hana provides for easy installation; a raised profile shows off more of the gorgeous hammered copper. Hana copper bathroom sink is artisan crafted; forged of high-quality recycled copper.

  • Apply Native Trails' MetalProtect to seal Polished Copper and Polished Nickel finishes
  • Constructed of 16-gauge copper for lasting elegance and durability
  • Rectangular basin gives a classically clean look to your bathroom countertop
  • Raised profile shows off beautiful hammered texture
  • Hand-hammered surface provides beautiful texture and visual impact
  • Drop-in installation simplifies setup
  • 1.5-inch drain opening
  • Copper's natural antimicrobial properties help keep your sink clean
  • UPC/cUPC compliant
  • Due to their handcrafted nature, no two products will be exactly the same and may vary in finish, texture and other details

Brushed Nickel finish offers a warm-toned silver color, plated over hammered copper for a soft, beautifully textured finish.

Artisan-crafted using NativeStone: an innovative blend of cement and natural jute fiber, Nipomo is resilient enough for heavy-duty tasks with a refreshingly easy cleanup.

description.en:
Showcase the organic beauty of concrete in your bath with Tolosa's silky smooth surface and elegant design. This oval bathroom sink can be installed as an undermount for a smooth countertop, or as a drop-in with an eye-catching raised profile. Artisan-crafted using NativeStone: an innovative blend of cement and natural jute fiber, Tolosa is resilient enough for heavy-duty tasks with a refreshingly easy cleanup.

  • Handcrafted from an innovative blend of concrete and jute fiber

  • Oval basin couples functionality with aesthetic appeal
  • 1.5-inch drain opening
  • UPC/cUPC compliant
  • Covered under Native Trails limited five year warranty
  • Clean with mild, non-abrasive soap and cleaners
  • Due to their handcrafted nature, no two products will be exactly the same and may vary in finish, texture and other details

description.en:
The clean lines and smooth, matte surface of Trough 3019 radiate modernity, while earthy concrete adds a warm farmhouse aesthetic to any design. This trough sink is Artisan-crafted of NativeStone: an innovative blend of cement and natural jute fiber, resilient enough for heavy-duty tasks with a refreshingly easy cleanup. An improved two-part sealer is proven to prevent staining, scratching and cracking. Now available in a smaller 30" size, the Trough 3019 brings organic beauty to more compact bathroom spaces.

  • Handcrafted from an innovative blend of concrete and jute fiber
  • IMPROVED SEALER! NativeStone Shield provides better protection from stains, scratches and cracks
  • 30-inch sink width allows for installation in smaller bathroom spaces

  • UPC/cUPC compliant
  • Due to their handcrafted nature, no two products will be exactly the same and may vary in finish, texture and other details
  • Clean with mild, non-abrasive soap and cleaners
  • Covered under Native Trails limited five year warranty

description.en:
The clean lines and smooth, matte surface of Trough 3019 radiate modernity, while earthy concrete adds a warm farmhouse aesthetic to any design. This trough sink is Artisan-crafted of NativeStone: an innovative blend of cement and natural jute fiber, resilient enough for heavy-duty tasks with a refreshingly easy cleanup. An improved two-part sealer is proven to prevent staining, scratching and cracking. Now available in a smaller 30" size, the Trough 3019 brings organic beauty to more compact bathroom spaces.

  • Handcrafted from an innovative blend of concrete and jute fiber
  • IMPROVED SEALER! NativeStone Shield provides better protection from stains, scratches and cracks
  • 30-inch sink width allows for installation in smaller bathroom spaces

  • Due to their handcrafted nature, no two products will be exactly the same and may vary in finish, texture and other details

  • Handcrafted from an innovative blend of concrete and jute fiber
  • IMPROVED SEALER! NativeStone Shield provides better protection from stains, scratches and cracks
  • No pre-drilled faucet holes; for use with wall-mounted faucets
  • Trough-shaped basin provides a sleek focal point to modern industrial-inspired bathrooms
  • Drop-in installation simplifies setup
  • 1.5-inch drain opening

  • Covered under Native Trails limited five year warranty
  • Clean with mild, non-abrasive soap and cleaners
  • Due to their handcrafted nature, no two products will be exactly the same and may vary in finish, texture and other details

title.ar: Native Trails Trough 3019 in Terracotta - NSL3019-T

description.en:
The clean lines and smooth, matte surface of Trough 3019 radiate modernity, while earthy concrete adds a warm farmhouse aesthetic to any design. This trough sink is Artisan-crafted of NativeStone: an innovative blend of cement and natural jute fiber, resilient enough for heavy-duty tasks with a refreshingly easy cleanup. An improved two-part sealer is proven to prevent staining, scratching and cracking. Now available in a smaller 30" size, the Trough 3019 brings organic beauty to more compact bathroom spaces.

  • Handcrafted from an innovative blend of concrete and jute fiber
  • IMPROVED SEALER! NativeStone Shield provides better protection from stains, scratches and cracks
  • 30-inch sink width allows for installation in smaller bathroom spaces
  • Trough-shaped basin provides a sleek focal point to modern industrial-inspired bathrooms
  • Drop-in installation simplifies setup
  • 1.5-inch drain opening
  • UPC/cUPC compliant
  • Due to their handcrafted nature, no two products will be exactly the same and may vary in finish, texture and other details
  • Clean with mild, non-abrasive soap and cleaners
  • Covered under Native Trails limited five year warranty

description.en:
With its clean lines and generous size, this 36" concrete trough bathroom sink is perfect for bathroom spaces of any aesthetic. Trough 3619's raised profile showcases a smooth surface and mottled finish and is perfectly sized for a 48" single vanity. Artisan-crafted of NativeStone: an innovative blend of cement and natural jute fiber, Trough 3619 is resilient enough for heavy-duty tasks with a refreshingly easy cleanup

  • Handcrafted from an innovative blend of concrete and jute fiber
  • IMPROVED SEALER! NativeStone Shield provides better protection from stains, scratches and cracks
  • Comes with one pre-drilled faucet hole
  • Trough-shaped basin provides a sleek focal point to modern industrial-inspired bathrooms
  • Drop-in installation simplifies setup
  • 1.5-inch drain opening
  • UPC/cUPC compliant
  • Covered under Native Trails limited five year warranty
  • Clean with mild, non-abrasive soap and cleaners
  • Due to their handcrafted nature, no two products will be exactly the same and may vary in finish, texture and other details

description.en:
The RectorSeal EZ Trap EZT-113B (MPN: 83114) is a 3/4-inch transparent condensate trap kit designed for light-duty applications in HVAC systems. Its clear construction allows for easy inspection and cleaning, ensuring efficient condensate management.

  • Transparent Design: Facilitates straightforward monitoring and maintenance of the condensate system.
  • Durable Construction: Made with schedule 40 PVC fittings for enhanced durability.
  • Watertight Red Caps: Provide easy access for cleaning the trap and drain pan outlet.?
  • Included Cleaning Brush: Comes with a flexible brush that can be mounted on the trap when not in use.

title.en: Zurn XL Short Stem Quarter-Turn Ceramic Disc Cartridge, Cold - 59517005
title.zh: Zurn XL Short Stem Quarter-Turn Ceramic Disc Cartridge, Cold - 59517005
title.id: Zurn XL Short Stem Quarter-Turn Ceramic Disc Cartridge, Cold - 59517005
title.th: Zurn XL Short Stem Quarter-Turn Ceramic Disc Cartridge, Cold - 59517005
title.vi: Zurn XL Short Stem Quarter-Turn Ceramic Disc Cartridge, Cold - 59517005
title.ar: Zurn XL Short Stem Quarter-Turn Ceramic Disc Cartridge, Cold - 59517005

description.en:
Save money and resources by repairing or replacing faucet components, rather than replacing the entire unit. Zurn's ceramic disc cartridges are made of heavy-duty cast brass for AquaSpec faucets (part no. 59517005) and stop leaks that originate from the handle. Ultradurable and expected to last for up to 1 million cycles. This short, 2 1/8-in. cartridge is for quarter-turn faucets and has an exposed chrome cartridge retaining nut. Intended for the right-hand cold-water handle; opens clockwise and closes counterclockwise. When you need a replacement part for repair or maintenance of a faucet, trust Zurn for genuine, reliable parts.

  • Pre-assembled for easy installation
  • Fits AquaSpec cold-water handles�opens clockwise/closes counterclockwise
  • Short, 2 1/8" stem for faucet handles with an exposed retaining nut (not for Zurn faucets with covered retaining nut)
  • Cast brass provides durability while complying with the Safe Water Drinking Act
  • Positive shutoff eliminates drips and leakage to save water without over-turning the handles
  • Square broach allows handles to align perfectly
  • Interchangeable with other manufacturer's parts
  • Chicago part no.�1-100XKJKABNF
  • Limited lifetime warranty

description.en:
Replace a worn out or leaking faucet cartridge with this Zurn Elkay 59517006 XL short stem hot quarter turn ceramic disc cartridge. Zurn Elkay replacement manual faucet cartridges help you improve performance and efficiency by reducing water leaks. This cartridge features a quarter turn design with a short stem. It is made for use with a hot water faucet handle.

  • Quarter turn, short stem design
  • Replaces a worn out or damaged faucet cartridge
  • Made for use with a hot water faucet handle

description.en:
The Mansfield Plumbing 216BI is a Petite Maple Undercounter Lavatory sink, offering a compact and elegant solution for bathrooms with limited space.

  • Design: Oval-shaped lavatory with a neutral design, facilitating a smooth transition from counter to sink.
  • Installation: Undercounter mounting for a sleek appearance.
  • Overflow: Features a concealed front overflow.
  • ADA Compliance: Complies with ADA requirements for accessibility.
  • Faucet: Faucet not included; designed to accommodate various faucet styles.

title.en: California Faucets 9050ZB-SN ZeroDrain Pop-Down Style Lavatory Drain: Satin - 2 Pack
title.zh: California Faucets 9050ZB-SN ZeroDrain Pop-Down Style Lavatory Drain: Satin - 2 Pack
title.id: California Faucets 9050ZB-SN ZeroDrain Pop-Down Style Lavatory Drain: Satin - 2 Pack
title.th: California Faucets 9050ZB-SN ZeroDrain Pop-Down Style Lavatory Drain: Satin - 2 Pack
title.vi: California Faucets 9050ZB-SN ZeroDrain Pop-Down Style Lavatory Drain: Satin - 2 Pack
title.ar: California Faucets 9050ZB-SN ZeroDrain Pop-Down Style Lavatory Drain: Satin - 2 Pack

description.en:
2 Pack

California Faucets 9050ZB-SN ZeroDrain Pop-Down Style Lavatory Drain

Satin Nickel Finish

  • Stopper is flush with flange in open position
  • For use on sinks with overflow or less overflow
  • Finished upper flange and stopper only (tailpiece unfinished)
  • Connection: 1-1/4" x 4" tailpiece
  • Single unit for both overflow and less overflow applications
  • 2-1/4" diameter upper flange
  • 1-1/4" OD X 4" tailpiece (total below sink length is 6-1/2"; length is 7" when thin sink spacer is used)
  • Maximum installation thickness 2" (add 9050Z-EXT for thicker applications)
  • Longer tailpiece available see 9069
  • For widespread faucet with lift knob & rod, it is recommended to add LR-RET

title.en: California Faucets 9050ZB-SN ZeroDrain Pop-Down Style Lavatory Drain: Satin - 10 Pack
title.zh: California Faucets 9050ZB-SN ZeroDrain Pop-Down Style Lavatory Drain: Satin - 10 Pack
title.id: California Faucets 9050ZB-SN ZeroDrain Pop-Down Style Lavatory Drain: Satin - 10 Pack
title.th: California Faucets 9050ZB-SN ZeroDrain Pop-Down Style Lavatory Drain: Satin - 10 Pack
title.vi: California Faucets 9050ZB-SN ZeroDrain Pop-Down Style Lavatory Drain: Satin - 10 Pack
title.ar: California Faucets 9050ZB-SN ZeroDrain Pop-Down Style Lavatory Drain: Satin - 10 Pack

description.en:
10 Pack

California Faucets 9050ZB-SN ZeroDrain Pop-Down Style Lavatory Drain

Satin Nickel Finish

  • Stopper is flush with flange in open position
  • For use on sinks with overflow or less overflow
  • Finished upper flange and stopper only (tailpiece unfinished)
  • Connection: 1-1/4" x 4" tailpiece
  • Single unit for both overflow and less overflow applications
  • 2-1/4" diameter upper flange
  • 1-1/4" OD X 4" tailpiece (total below sink length is 6-1/2"; length is 7" when thin sink spacer is used)
  • Maximum installation thickness 2" (add 9050Z-EXT for thicker applications)
  • Longer tailpiece available see 9069
  • For widespread faucet with lift knob & rod, it is recommended to add LR-RET

title.ar: TOTO Kiwami Renesse Oval 24 Inch Vessel Bathroom Sink in Matte Black - LT474#MBL

description.en:
Upgrade your bathroom counter instantly with the TOTO Kiwami Oval Vessel Bathroom Sink. The Kiwami oval sink is a modern and elegantly design that incorporates beautiful thin edges. Crafted with the extremely smooth and durable material and completed with a beautiful matte finish. For use with included grid drain assembly only. The Kiwami Vessel sink is ADA compliant. Includes drain, decorative drain cover, and installation template. Faucet sold separately. Recommend using faucet with maximum height of 8 inches.

  • Modern and elegant, oval vessel bathroom sink
  • Designed with thin, rounded edges achieving a decorative design
  • Expertly crafted with Linear Ceram to maintain it's smooth, thin design for years to come
  • For use with included drain # only
  • ADA compliant
  • Includes drain and installation template
  • Faucet sold separately

description.en: Mansfield 217 WH (“Maple” series) is an oval, under-counter/undermount lavatory sink made from vitreous china. It features a concealed front overflow and is ADA compliant. The bowl dimensions are approximately 17-5/16 in wide by 14-1/8 in deep, with the overall sink being about 19-3/4 in by 16 in by 7-1/8 in high. The product comes in White (also available in some other colors like Biscuit) and is manufactured in the USA. Mounting clips, the drain assembly, and supply lines are not included.

description.en:
The TOTO Kiwami Asymmetrical Vessel Bathroom Sink has a modern design that flows smoothly but also provides a vibrant shape that enhances your bathroom counter. Crafted with the extremely smooth and durable material and completed with a beautiful clean matte finish. The Kiwami Asymmetrical Vessel Sink features a front overflow and is ADA compliant. Included is sink only. Faucet and drain must be purchased separately. The recommended faucet height from deck to spout is 8.3125 inches and below. Compatible drain THP737 (Kick Lever) or THP739 (Wire Type) is sold separately.

  • Stylish asymmetrical shape
  • Thin, rounded edges create a modern and stylish addition to any bathroom style
  • Expertly crafted with Linear Ceram to maintain it's smooth, thin design for years to come
  • Front overflow
  • ADA compliant

description.en:
The TOTO Kiwami Asymmetrical Vessel Bathroom Sink has a modern design that flows smoothly but also provides a vibrant shape that enhances your bathroom counter. Crafted with the extremely smooth and durable material and completed with a beautiful clean matte finish. The Kiwami Asymmetrical Vessel Sink features a front overflow and is ADA compliant. Included is sink only. Faucet and drain must be purchased separately. The recommended faucet height from deck to spout is 8.3125 inches and below. Compatible drain THP737 (Kick Lever) or THP739 (Wire Type) is sold separately.

  • Stylish asymmetrical shape
  • Thin, rounded edges create a modern and stylish addition to any bathroom style
  • Expertly crafted with Linear Ceram to maintain it's smooth, thin design for years to come
  • Front overflow
  • ADA compliant
  • Includes vessel sink only
  • Faucet and drain sold separately

description.en:
The THP739#MBL Decorative MATTE BLACK Ceramic Drain Cover offers additional style to the Kiwami sink by allowing users to cover the chrome drain with a decorative ceramic cover. This drain cover is designed for faucets with wire type drain assembly, including the TOTO GB19 Faucet models. The drain cover creates a uniform and seamless look with this quick and easy-to-install addition to the Kiwami sink.

  • Decorative Matte Black drain cover plate (ceramic)
  • Kiwami Sink Collection Part
  • Designed for GB19 Faucets with wire drain assembly
  • Included: Drain cover plate only

description.en:
***OPEN BOX/CLOSE OUT*** Product is in grate shape, may be dusty, box has been opened. Simplisitic and elegant, the Providence?? Bath Collection aims to mimic the very essence of water itself with the fluid curve of its spout. Pair the hot water French lever handle with the Providence?? lavatory, Roman tub or bidet faucet or Roman tub handshower to customize the design. Must order cold water handle separately for lavatory, Roman tub and bidet faucets.

MUST order two handles for lav, roman tub & bidet LHP faucets; Model # = one handle

All handles are ADA-compliant

Comes with mounting screws

Model # indicates C = Cold, H = Hot (can use either for handshower)

  • US Patented design No. 915102
  • ASME A112.18.2/CSA B125.2 Compliant
  • 2-1/4" Outside Diameter Grid

title.en: Mountain Plumbing MT328SJ/EB Slip Joint Tailpiece Extension Tube for Lavatory Drains in English Bronze Finish
title.zh: Mountain Plumbing MT328SJ/EB Slip Joint Tailpiece Extension Tube for Lavatory Drains in English Bronze Finish
title.id: Mountain Plumbing MT328SJ/EB Slip Joint Tailpiece Extension Tube for Lavatory Drains in English Bronze Finish
title.th: Mountain Plumbing MT328SJ/EB Slip Joint Tailpiece Extension Tube for Lavatory Drains in English Bronze Finish
title.vi: Mountain Plumbing MT328SJ/EB Slip Joint Tailpiece Extension Tube for Lavatory Drains in English Bronze Finish
title.ar: Mountain Plumbing MT328SJ/EB Slip Joint Tailpiece Extension Tube for Lavatory Drains in English Bronze Finish

description.en:
A 1-1/4" x 8", 17 gauge Slip Joint Tailpiece Extension Tube for standard P-Traps.

  • Compatible with all Mountain Plumbing lavatory drains.
  • Also compatible with most other manufacturer�s lavatory drains.
  • Attaches to existing 1 1/4" tailpiece.
  • Fully plated for exposed applications.
  • Can be cut to size.
  • 17 Gauge Brass
  • English Bronze Finish
  • Spec Sheet

description.en: The TOTO Promenade Rectangular Pedestal Bathroom Sink for Single Hole Faucets is traditionally elegant with distinctive lines. The Promenade features a spacious basin, large backsplash and rear overflow. The Promenade pedestal sink is designed in TOTO's Universal Height, offering a more comfortable experience across a wide range of users.Elegant, distinctive rectangular designVitreous china pedestal and sink combination complete with mounting hardwareUniversal Height: 34" rim provides a more comfortable position across a wide range of usersRear overflowSingle faucet hole

title.en: Oatey 43579 2 or 3 In. PVC General Purpose Drain with 4 In. Stainless Steel Strainer
title.zh: Oatey 43579 2 or 3 In. PVC General Purpose Drain with 4 In. Stainless Steel Strainer
title.id: Oatey 43579 2 or 3 In. PVC General Purpose Drain with 4 In. Stainless Steel Strainer
title.th: Oatey 43579 2 or 3 In. PVC General Purpose Drain with 4 In. Stainless Steel Strainer
title.vi: Oatey 43579 2 or 3 In. PVC General Purpose Drain with 4 In. Stainless Steel Strainer
title.ar: Oatey 43579 2 or 3 In. PVC General Purpose Drain with 4 In. Stainless Steel Strainer

description.en:
Since 1916, Oatey has provided reliable, high-quality products for the residential and commercial plumbing industries, with a commitment to delivering quality, building trust and improving lives. Today, Oatey operates a comprehensive manufacturing and distribution network to supply thousands of products for professional builders, contractors, engineers and do-it-yourself consumers around the world.

  • General purpose PVC drain
  • Fits over 2 in. or inside 3 in. DWV pipe
  • Includes 4 in. screw-tite stainless steel strainer
  • Solvent weld inside 3 in. PVC Sch. 40 pipe or over 2 in. PVC Sch. 40 pipe
  • For use indoors or outdoors
  • Only 1-3/16 Inch high for tight spaces
  • Removable 4-Inch stainless steel strainer

description.en:
An Elkay Lustertone Classic stainless steel sink looks as great on day 3,000 as it does on day one. The rich, uniform grain is scratch resistant for heavy-duty use, whether it's a kitchen sink or a prep, bar, laundry or commercial sink. Light scratches, which occur with everyday use, naturally blend into the finish of this durable sink with time. Deeper scratches are repairable with an Elkay stainless steel restoration kit. Available in ADA depths.

  • REPAIRABLE FINISH: Finish is scratch resistant to heavy-duty use. Deep scratches are repairable. Lustrous grain reflects light evenly for high shine.
  • DROP-IN INSTALLATION: Sink is designed for drop-in installation to make the sink a focal point of your room.
  • 18-GAUGE STAINLESS STEEL: Highest quality 18-gauge thickness and Type 304 stainless steel for lasting durability, performance and lustrous beauty.
  • QUIET: Sound-deadening pad(s) minimizes sound and vibration for a quieter time at the sink.
  • U-CHANNEL INSTALLATION: Mounting clips placed inside the channel before installation mean less time under the sink for an easier install.
  • LARGE CAPACITY: Straight sidewalls give the sink a flat bottom and offer more usable space for stacking, soaking and washing dishes; easy to clean.
  • LAVATORY SINKS: Add style to the bath with an elegantly designed sink by Elkay.
  • DRAIN OPENING: Sink drain opening measures 3-1/2".
  • KIT INCLUDES: LR17202 sink, LKD2432C faucet; conveniently packaged together to save you time.

description.en:
Elkay has been a trusted name in stainless steel since 1920. We are proud to be America's No. 1 selling kitchen sink company. In addition, we offer prep, bar, bath and laundry sinks. Elkay commercial sinks can be found in public spaces such as classrooms, office buildings, health care facilities, parks and recreation areas and more. Available in ADA depths.

  • ADA COMPLIANT: Product is ADA compliant when properly installed.
  • DROP-IN INSTALLATION: Sink is designed for drop-in installation to make the sink a focal point of your room.
  • 20-GAUGE STAINLESS STEEL: Highest grade 20-gauge thickness and Type 304 stainless steel for everyday lasting durability, performance and finish.
  • QUIET: Sound-deadening pad(s) minimizes sound and vibration for a quieter time at the sink.
  • U-CHANNEL INSTALLATION: Mounting clips placed inside the channel before installation mean less time under the sink for an easier install.
  • OFFSET DRAIN: Drain placement provides more usable space on the bottom of the sink and in the cabinet below.
  • MADE IN THE USA: This Elkay product is proudly made in the USA.
  • LAVATORY SINKS: Add style to the bath with an elegantly designed sink by Elkay.
  • DRAIN OPENING: Sink drain opening measures 1-1/2".
  • CABINET SIZE: Minimum cabinet size for this sink is 24".

description.en:
Elkay has been a trusted name in stainless steel since 1920. We are proud to be America's No. 1 selling kitchen sink company. In addition, we offer prep, bar, bath and laundry sinks. Elkay commercial sinks can be found in public spaces such as classrooms, office buildings, health care facilities, parks and recreation areas and more. Available in ADA depths.

  • ADA COMPLIANT: Product is ADA compliant when properly installed.
  • DROP-IN INSTALLATION: Sink is designed for drop-in installation to make the sink a focal point of your room.
  • 20-GAUGE STAINLESS STEEL: Highest grade 20-gauge thickness and Type 304 stainless steel for everyday lasting durability, performance and finish.
  • QUIET: Sound-deadening pad(s) minimizes sound and vibration for a quieter time at the sink.
  • U-CHANNEL INSTALLATION: Mounting clips placed inside the channel before installation mean less time under the sink for an easier install.
  • OFFSET DRAIN: Drain placement provides more usable space on the bottom of the sink and in the cabinet below.
  • MADE IN THE USA: This Elkay product is proudly made in the USA.
  • LAVATORY SINKS: Add style to the bath with an elegantly designed sink by Elkay.
  • DRAIN OPENING: Sink drain opening measures 1-1/2".
  • CABINET SIZE: Minimum cabinet size for this sink is 24".

description.en:
Introduce inspired beauty into the bath with an Elkay Asana bathroom sink. The smooth curves of this collection create a compelling presence without overpowering the senses. Choose from striking finishes to complement your decor, including Lustrous Satin, Hammered Mirror and Copper.

  • ADA COMPLIANT: Product is ADA compliant when properly installed.
  • REPAIRABLE FINISH: Finish is scratch resistant to heavy-duty use. Deep scratches are repairable. Lustrous grain reflects light evenly for high shine.
  • UNDERMOUNT INSTALLATION: Sink is installed beneath the countertop creating a seamless appearance between the sink and the countertop.
  • 18-GAUGE STAINLESS STEEL: Highest quality 18-gauge thickness and Type 304 stainless steel for lasting durability, performance and lustrous beauty.
  • QUIET: Sound-deadening pad(s) minimizes sound and vibration for a quieter time at the sink.
  • MADE IN THE USA: This Elkay product is proudly made in the USA.
  • LAVATORY SINKS: Add style to the bath with an elegantly designed sink by Elkay.
  • DRAIN OPENING: Sink drain opening measures 2".
  • CABINET SIZE: Minimum cabinet size for this sink is 18".

The elegant Dome Drain from Native Trails is specifically designed to provide for unobstructed flow, giving it a distinct advantage over other similar-looking drains. High quality plating and thicker gauge metal make all Native Trails bathroom sink drains the best of class. Available in finishes that perfectly coordinate with Native Trails' hand: Hammered Copper and nickel sinks and NativeStone concrete sinks.

Native Trails' bathroom drains and decorative P-traps are designed to fit and perform seamlessly with their counterparts, adding to the utility and beauty of a: Hammered Copper or NativeStone sink.

description.en:
The 1.5" Push to Seal Dome Drain allows for complete closure of the drain and opening of the drain, as needed. Push down to close the drain; push again to open. The Push to Seal Dome Drain has maximum threading to create a snug fit. High quality plating and thicker gauge metal make all Native Trails drains the best of class. Available in finishes that perfectly coordinate with Native Trails' hand: Hammered Copper and nickel sinks and NativeStone concrete sinks.

Native Trails' bathroom drains and decorative P-traps are designed to fit and perform seamlessly with their counterparts, adding to the utility and beauty of a: Hammered Copper or NativeStone® sink.

The 1.5" Teardrop Drain is a stylish lavatory drain. Its larger-sized teardrop-shaped holes and its slightly domed shape provide superior drainage, preventing drainage-blocking bubbles from forming and stopping items that just shouldn't go down. High quality plating and thicker gauge metal make all Native Trails drains the best of class. Available in finishes that perfectly coordinate with Native Trails' hand-hammered copper and nickel sinks and NativeStone sinks.

Native Trails' bathroom drains and decorative P-traps are designed to fit and perform seamlessly with their counterparts, adding to the utility and beauty of a: Hammered Copper or NativeStone sink.

description.en:
The 1.5" Teardrop Drain is a stylish lavatory drain. Its larger-sized teardrop-shaped holes and its slightly domed shape provide superior drainage, preventing drainage-blocking bubbles from forming and stopping items that just shouldn't go down. High quality plating and thicker gauge metal make all Native Trails drains the best of class. Available in finishes that perfectly coordinate with Native Trails' hand-hammered copper and nickel sinks and NativeStone sinks.

Native Trails' bathroom drains and decorative P-traps are designed to fit and perform seamlessly with their counterparts, adding to the utility and beauty of a: Hammered Copper or NativeStone sink.

description.en:
The 1.5" Push to Seal Dome Drain allows for complete closure of the drain and opening of the drain, as needed. Push down to close the drain; push again to open. The Push to Seal Dome Drain has maximum threading to create a snug fit. High quality plating and thicker gauge metal make all Native Trails drains the best of class. Available in finishes that perfectly coordinate with Native Trails' hand: Hammered Copper and nickel sinks and NativeStone concrete sinks.

Native Trails' bathroom drains and decorative P-traps are designed to fit and perform seamlessly with their counterparts, adding to the utility and beauty of a: Hammered Copper or NativeStone® sink.

Whether displayed above the counter as a vessel, installed behind cabinetry as an undermount, or showcased as a farmhouse-style apron-front, this concrete sink's matte texture adds an understated luxury to any bathroom. The Nipomo is artisan-crafted of NativeStone: an innovative blend of cement and natural jute fiber. NativeStone delivers resilience for heavy-duty tasks, in conjunction with a refreshingly easy cleanup.

The groundbreaking NativeStone® Collection of bathroom sinks is a mesmerizing combination of contemporary artistry and innovation. title.th: Native Trails DR130-MB 1.5" Push to Seal Dome Drain: Matte Black
title.vi: Native Trails DR130-MB 1.5" Push to Seal Dome Drain: Matte Black
title.ar: Native Trails DR130-MB 1.5" Push to Seal Dome Drain: Matte Black

description.en:
The Native Trails DR130-MB Push to Seal Dome Drain is designed to provide a sleek and functional drain solution for compatible bathroom sinks. Featuring a modern matte black finish, this drain complements contemporary bathroom fixtures while delivering reliable performance.

The push-to-seal mechanism allows the drain to open and close with a simple press, providing convenient control of water flow without the need for a traditional lift rod. The durable construction ensures long-lasting use in residential bathroom installations.

  • Push-to-seal dome drain for bathroom sinks
  • 1.5 inch drain size for compatible sink installations
  • Matte black finish for a modern appearance
  • Simple push operation opens and closes the drain
  • Durable construction designed for long-lasting performance

description.en:
The elegant Dome Drain from Native Trails is specifically designed to provide for unobstructed flow, giving it a distinct advantage over other similar-looking drains. High quality plating and thicker gauge metal make all Native Trails bathroom sink drains the best of class. Available in finishes that perfectly coordinate with Native Trails' hand: Hammered Copper and nickel sinks and NativeStone concrete sinks.

Native Trails' bathroom drains and decorative P-traps are designed to fit and perform seamlessly with their counterparts, adding to the utility and beauty of a: Hammered Copper or NativeStone sink.

title.ar: Native Trails NSL2115-E Cuyama Bathroom Sink: Earth

description.en:
With an elegant raised profile and wide lip, the Cuyama radiates graceful sophistication with a hint of rustic comfort. This bathroom sink is Artisan-crafted of NativeStone: an innovative blend of cement and natural jute fiber. NativeStone delivers resilience for heavy-duty tasks, in conjunction with a refreshingly easy cleanup. Available in four finishes: Ash, Slate, Pearl and Earth.

The groundbreaking NativeStone Collection of bathroom sinks is a mesmerizing combination of contemporary artistry and innovation. Handmade by artisans using a sustainable blend of natural materials, these eco-friendly sinks are exceptional in their lighter weight, one-of-a-kind coloration, and extraordinary stain, scratch, and crack resistance.

The Decorative P-Trap from Native Trails lends a graceful touch to exposed plumbing installations. Elegantly styled, this P-Trap is available in long lasting finishes that perfectly coordinate with Native Trails' handmade sinks and bath vanities.

Native Trails' bathroom drains and decorative P-traps are designed to fit and perform seamlessly with their counterparts, adding to the utility and beauty of a: Hammered Copper or NativeStone sink.

With its clean lines and generous size, this concrete sink is an ideal presentation piece for bathroom spaces of any aesthetic. The Trough 3619's raised profile showcases a smooth surface and mottled finish, and with one drain opening, it is perfectly sized for a 48" single vanity. The Trough 3619 is artisan-crafted of NativeStone: an innovative blend of cement and natural jute fiber. NativeStone delivers resilience for heavy-duty tasks, in conjunction with a refreshingly easy cleanup.

The groundbreaking NativeStone® Collection of bathroom sinks is a mesmerizing combination of contemporary artistry and innovation. Handmade by artisans using a sustainable blend of natural materials, these eco-friendly sinks are exceptional in their lighter weight, one-of-a-kind coloration, and extraordinary stain, scratch, and crack resistance.

description.en:
A bold focal point for larger bathrooms, the Trough 4819 effortlessly combines the functionality of two sinks with the style and convenience of one. The Trough 4819 concrete sink is artisan-crafted of NativeStone: an innovative blend of cement and natural jute fiber. NativeStone delivers resilience for heavy-duty tasks, in conjunction with a refreshingly easy cleanup.

The groundbreaking NativeStone Collection of bathroom sinks is a mesmerizing combination of contemporary artistry and innovation. Handmade by artisans using a sustainable blend of natural materials, these eco-friendly sinks are exceptional in their lighter weight, one-of-a-kind coloration, and extraordinary stain, scratch, and crack resistance.

description.en:
Our square style decorative lavatory bottle trap for exposed applications. The Square Style Decorative Bottle Trap is used with glass, vessel, or wall-hung lavatory sinks as well as pedestals or consoles where there is exposed plumbing applications. Unique, upscale, and sophisticated, this is the perfect trap to use for that designer look!

  • Fully plated drain with 17 gauge tube
  • 1-1/4" x 1-1/4" trap with 9" drain tube
  • Includes flange and reducer seal to attach 1-1/4" drain tube to 1-1/2" wall drain
  • IAPMO (UPC) Approved
  • This the first square bottle trap to be approved in the USA

SPEC SHEET

description.en:
MT1000

Our traditional style decorative lavatory bottle trap for exposed applications. The Deluxe Decorative Bottle Trap is used with glass, vessel, or wall-hung lavatory sinks as well as pedestals or consoles where there is exposed plumbing applications. Unique, upscale, and sophisticated, this is the perfect trap to use for that designer look!

  • Patented design with a heavy cast brass body
  • Fully plated drain with 17 gauge tube
  • 1-1/4" x 1-1/4" trap with 9" drain tube
  • Includes flange and reducer seal to attach 1-1/4" drain tube to 1-1/2" wall drain
  • IAPMO (UPC) Approved

title.en: Elkay Asana Stainless Steel 18" x 14" x 6" Single Bowl Undermount Bathroom Sink
title.zh: Elkay Asana Stainless Steel 18" x 14" x 6" Single Bowl Undermount Bathroom Sink
title.id: Elkay Asana Stainless Steel 18" x 14" x 6" Single Bowl Undermount Bathroom Sink
title.th: Elkay Asana Stainless Steel 18" x 14" x 6" Single Bowl Undermount Bathroom Sink
title.vi: Elkay Asana Stainless Steel 18" x 14" x 6" Single Bowl Undermount Bathroom Sink
title.ar: Elkay Asana Stainless Steel 18" x 14" x 6" Single Bowl Undermount Bathroom Sink

description.en:
Introduce inspired beauty into the bath with an Elkay Asana bathroom sink. The smooth curves of this collection create a compelling presence without overpowering the senses. Choose from striking finishes to complement your decor, including Lustrous Satin, Hammered Mirror and Copper.

  • ADA COMPLIANT: Product is ADA compliant when properly installed.
  • REPAIRABLE FINISH: Finish is scratch resistant to heavy-duty use. Deep scratches are repairable. Lustrous grain reflects light evenly for high shine.
  • UNDERMOUNT INSTALLATION: Sink is installed beneath the countertop creating a seamless appearance between the sink and the countertop.
  • 18-GAUGE STAINLESS STEEL: Highest quality 18-gauge thickness and Type 304 stainless steel for lasting durability, performance and lustrous beauty.
  • QUIET: Sound-deadening pad(s) minimizes sound and vibration for a quieter time at the sink.
  • OFFSET DRAIN: Drain placement provides more usable space on the bottom of the sink and in the cabinet below.
  • LAVATORY SINKS: Add style to the bath with an elegantly designed sink by Elkay.
  • DRAIN OPENING: Sink drain opening measures 1-1/2".
  • INCLUDES: LKF293 overflow Assembly.

title.vi: Native Trails CPS802 ASPEN: Hammered Copper Freestanding Bathtub
title.ar: Native Trails CPS802 ASPEN: Hammered Copper Freestanding Bathtub

description.en:
The Aspen unapologetically steals the show. A stunning focal point in a luxury bath, its hand: Hammered Copper texture is sublime. This copper bath tub provides not only beauty but optimum comfort, with its perfectly angled sides and deep interior. The Aspen double-walled soaker tub is insulated to ensure that your hot, relaxing soak will last. Hand-hammered and forged of high-quality recycled copper, each piece displays a one-of-a-kind character.

Since the time of ancient Crete, the restorative qualities of soaker bathtubs have been legendary. Native Trails freestanding tubs up the ante on the legend, creating an impressive focal point for the bath; a blissful retreat for body and soul.

title.en: Native Trails UK2547 47" Sink Undermount Kit
title.zh: Native Trails UK2547 47" Sink Undermount Kit
title.id: Native Trails UK2547 47" Sink Undermount Kit
title.th: Native Trails UK2547 47" Sink Undermount Kit
title.vi: Native Trails UK2547 47" Sink Undermount Kit
title.ar: Native Trails UK2547 47" Sink Undermount Kit

description.en:
Native Trails' Sink Undermount Kit is a simple and secure method for undermounting any sink with or without a rim into a kitchen cabinet or bath vanity. It is highly recommended for NativeStone® rimless sinks due to its easy leveling with multiple adjustment points. The Large kit, adjustable from 25" to 47" in length, works well in cabinets 27"-48" wide. It is best for most kitchen and bathroom cabinet installations. The Small kit, adjustable from 14" to 26" in length, is best for small (less than 27" wide) bathroom vanity installations for front-to-back installation of rimmed sinks in standard cabinets.

Native Trails' Sink Undermount Kit is a simple and secure method for undermounting any sink with or without a rim into a kitchen cabinet or bath vanity. It is highly recommended for NativeStone® rimless sinks due to its easy leveling with multiple adjustment points.

An inspired convergence of texture, craft, and tradition transforms any bath into a personal sanctuary. Native Trails' bathroom sinks indulge with their beauty and practicality. The distinctive texture and warm glow is breathtaking; their effortless maintenance is refreshingly practical.

The TOTO Dantesca Oval Undermount Bathroom Sink offers a rimless, circular design. The Dantesca has a generously deep basin and concealed front overflow. This sink is ADA compliant.

  • Rimless, oval design for undermount installation
  • Concealed front overflow
  • Mounting assembly complete with installation template and mounting screw set for wood countertops
  • ADA Compliant
