The TOTO Rendezvous Oval Undermount Bathroom Sink offers a space-saving and elegant design. The Rendezvous sink features a beautiful rimless circular shape, a generously wide basin, and concealed front overflow. The Rendezvous is ADA compliant.

  • Elegant, space-saving oval design for undermount installation
  • Concealed front overflow
  • Mounting assembly complete with installation template and mounting screw set for wood countertops
  • ADA Compliant

title.zh: Delta EP102157 A/C Power Supply

title.th: Delta EP102157 A/C Power Supply
title.vi: Delta EP102157 A/C Power Supply

description.en: This A/C Power Adapter for Delta Touch Faucets provides you with worry-free, hands-free operation of your Delta faucet with Touch2O Technology. It plugs into any standard, non-switched 115-volt outlet in your sink cabinet and eliminates the need for batteries. Even if your homes power goes out, your Delta Touch2O faucet can still be manually operated, so you're never without water when you need it. Compatible with Delta Touch2O faucets with Gen 3 solenoids.

description.en:
The TOTO 20 Inch Rectangular Undermount Bathroom Sink with CEFIONTECT

  • ADA compliant
  • Rimless, rectangular design for undermount installation
  • CEFIONTECT
  • Ideal for narrow countertops
  • Front overflow
  • Mounting assembly complete with installation template and mounting screw set for wood countertops
  • THU410 is required for marble/granite type counter top installation and must be purchased separately

  • Ideal for narrow contertops
  • Rear overflow
  • Mounting assembly complete with installation template and mounting screw set for wood countertops
  • ADA compliant

description.en:
The TOTO Connelly� Square Undermount Bathroom Sink is created with a look of modern simplicity. The Connelly sink features a beautiful rimless, square design and generously spacious basin. The Connelly features an overflow that can be oriented to the front or to the rear. The Connelly sink is ADA compliant when installed with the overflow to the rear.

  • Modern, square design for undermount installation
  • Generous, spacious basin
  • Front or rear overflow
  • Mounting assembly complete with installation template and mounting screw set for wood countertops
  • ADA compliant when installed with the overflow to the rear

description.en:
Upgrade your bathroom counter instantly with the TOTO Kiwami Oval Vessel Bathroom Sink. Designed with CEFIONTECT

  • Faucets over 8 inches are not recommended
  • Faucet sold separately
  • Includes drain and installation template
  • Modern and elegant, oval vessel bathroom sink
  • Designed with thin, rounded edges achieving a decorative design
  • CEFIONTECT
  • Expertly crafted with Linear Ceram to maintain it's smooth, thin design for years to come
  • For use with included drain # only
  • ADA compliant

title.ar: Brizo HK37H-RB Providence Single Metal French Lever Handle Kit: Venetian Bronze

description.en:
Simplisitic and elegant, the Providence?? Bath Collection aims to mimic the very essence of water itself with the fluid curve of its spout. Pair the hot water French lever handle with the Providence?? lavatory, Roman tub or bidet faucet or Roman tub handshower to customize the design. Must order cold water handle separately for lavatory, Roman tub and bidet faucets.

MUST order two handles for lav, roman tub & bidet LHP faucets; Model # = one handle

All handles are ADA-compliant

Comes with mounting screws

Model # indicates C = Cold, H = Hot (can use either for handshower)

description.en:
The entire bath space lives in harmony with decorative P-Traps by Brizo. The perfect finishing touch for exposed plumbing installations, this p-trap features 17-gauge solid brass construction to meet the requirements of the Commonwealth of Massachusetts plumbing codes. The p-trap is available in 10 unique finishes to coordinate seamlessly with Brizo; bath collections.

  • 17 gauge brass construction
  • 1 �" diameter drain pipe
  • 12" overall length
  • Optional extension tube (RP101908XX) available for sink drainpipe
  • Attaches to 1 �" or 1 �" drain body, extension tube or tailpiece

title.vi: Delta Dorval Handle Adapters - RP100907
title.ar: Delta Dorval Handle Adapters - RP100907

description.en:
The Delta RP100907 is a handle adapter set from the Dorval collection, designed to facilitate the installation of Delta's two-handle wall-mount bathroom faucets, such as models T3556LF-WL and T3557LF-WL. This component ensures a secure and precise connection between the faucet handles and the valve rough-in, contributing to smooth operation and a polished appearance. Constructed from durable materials, the RP100907 is built to withstand daily use while maintaining the aesthetic integrity of the Dorval line.

  • Designed for Delta's Dorval two-handle wall-mount bathroom faucets.
  • Ensures secure and precise handle-to-valve connection.
  • Constructed from durable materials for long-lasting performance.

title.zh: Native Trails Rolled Classic in Polished Nickel - CPS840

title.th: Native Trails Rolled Classic in Polished Nickel - CPS840
title.vi: Native Trails Rolled Classic in Polished Nickel - CPS840
title.ar: Native Trails Rolled Classic in Polished Nickel - CPS840

description.en:
Rolled Classic copper bathroom sink embodies a sensible elegance. Its classic oval shape and rolled edge showcase a vibrant hammered texture, while its generous size emphasizes functionality. Artisan-crafted of high-quality recycled copper, this 18.5" hammered-copper sink adds a sophisticated finishing touch to any bathroom space. The Brushed Nickel finish offers a warm-toned silver color, plated over hammered copper for a soft, beautifully textured finish.

  • Plated with the highest quality nickel in the industry
  • Constructed of 18-gauge hand-hammered recycled copper
  • Oval basin couples functionality with aesthetic appeal
  • Drop-in installation simplifies setup
  • Hand-hammered surface provides beautiful texture and visual impact
  • 1.5-inch drain opening
  • UPC/cUPC compliant
  • Covered under Native Trails limited lifetime warranty; nickel plating covered under 10 year warranty
  • Clean with mild, non-abrasive soap and cleaners
  • Due to their handcrafted nature, no two products will be exactly the same and may vary in finish, texture and other details

title.en: Native Trails Lido in Abalone - MG1515-AE
title.zh: Native Trails Lido in Abalone - MG1515-AE
title.id: Native Trails Lido in Abalone - MG1515-AE
title.th: Native Trails Lido in Abalone - MG1515-AE
title.vi: Native Trails Lido in Abalone - MG1515-AE
title.ar: Native Trails Lido in Abalone - MG1515-AE

description.en:
Crafted in Italy of hand spun Murano Glass, the Lido vessel sink delivers both artistic style and easy maintenance. The smooth, nonporous surface of the sink prevents staining and its glass has been certified to resist cracking after exposure to both impact and temperature change. At 14.75 inches in diameter and using approximately half the energy required to create a porcelain sink, the Lido brings sustainable luxury to even the smallest bathroom spaces.

  • Petite, rounded-square bowl adds an artistic touch to modern bathrooms
  • Compact 14-3/4" diameter sink fits perfectly in smaller spaces
  • Hand spun in Murano, Italy
  • Glass certified to withstand point impact and thermal shock
  • Exceptionally stain resistant
  • 1-1/2" drain opening
  • UPC/cUPC compliant
  • Due to their handcrafted nature, no two products will be exactly the same and may vary in finish, texture and other details
  • Clean with mild, non-abrasive soap and cleaners
  • Covered under Native Trails limited lifetime warranty

description.en:
With its smooth surface and square design, the Ventana concrete bar sink is sophisticated, functional and low-maintenance. Whether showcasing the sink's apron front, or installing it behind cabinetry, the clean lines and mottled finish of this undermount bar sink adds elegance to any bar or prep area. Artisan-crafted using NativeStone: an innovative blend of cement and natural jute fiber, Ventana is resilient enough for heavy-duty tasks with a refreshingly easy cleanup.

  • Covered under Native Trails's 5 year limited warranty and 1 year limited commercial warranty
  • Constructed of concrete
  • Undermount installation - sink will install under the countertop and requires special cabinets with an exposed front
  • Single basin design for maximum work space
  • Center drain location provides optimal draining capability
  • Coordinates with products from the NativeStone line

description.en:
With its generous size and sleek design, this 36" copper trough sink is an ideal focal point for a modern bathroom. Its sloped basin showcases a vibrant hammered texture, and with one drain opening, Trough 36 is perfectly sized for a 48" single vanity.

  • Plated with the highest quality nickel in the industry
  • Constructed of 16-gauge copper for lasting elegance and durability
  • Designed for undermount and drop-in installations
  • Trough-shaped basin provides a sleek focal point to modern industrial-inspired bathrooms
  • Hand-hammered surface provides beautiful texture and visual impact
  • Pre-installed sound-dampening pads reduce noise
  • No faucet holes; requires wall-mount or counter-mount faucet
  • 1.5-inch drain opening
  • UPC/cUPC compliant
  • Due to their handcrafted nature, no two products will be exactly the same and may vary in finish, texture and other details

description.en:
Brizo VoiceIQ Technology allows you to dispense the exact amount of water you need, completely hands-free so you’re able to move freely—and work smarter. Just command your faucet to turn on and off, warm up or dispense exactly the right amount of water, all without lifting a finger.

  • Retrofit any Brizo SmartTouch faucet manufactured after 01/01/2018
  • Pairs with Amazon Alexa- and Google Assistant-enabled devices
  • Amazon, Alexa and all related logos are registered trademarks of Amazon Technologies, Inc.
  • Google Assistant is a registered trademark of Google LLC.
  • VoiceIQ Technology is not created by, affiliated with, or supported by Google LLC or Amazon Technologies, Inc.

• Pictured in Polished Chrome
  • Solid brass construction
  • Stopper is flush with flange in open position
  • Easy installation and maintenance of stopper
  • For use on sinks with overflow or less overflow
  • Polished and finished upper flange and stopper only
  • Connection: 1-1/4" x 4" tailpiece
  • US Patented design No. 915102
  • ASME A112.18.2/CSA B125.2 Compliant
  • 2-1/4" Outside Diameter Grid

  • GROHE SilkMove ensures smooth, precise handle operation
  • Quality solid brass body with metal handle for durability
  • WaterSense certified, uses 1.2gpm for water conservation
  • Limited lifetime warranty

title.en: Grohe Essence 23538A0A Single Hole Single-Handle Deck Mount Vessel Sink Faucet 1.2 GPM in Grohe Hard Graphite
title.zh: Grohe Essence 23538A0A Single Hole Single-Handle Deck Mount Vessel Sink Faucet 1.2 GPM in Grohe Hard Graphite
title.id: Grohe Essence 23538A0A Single Hole Single-Handle Deck Mount Vessel Sink Faucet 1.2 GPM in Grohe Hard Graphite
title.th: Grohe Essence 23538A0A Single Hole Single-Handle Deck Mount Vessel Sink Faucet 1.2 GPM in Grohe Hard Graphite
title.vi: Grohe Essence 23538A0A Single Hole Single-Handle Deck Mount Vessel Sink Faucet 1.2 GPM in Grohe Hard Graphite
title.ar: Grohe Essence 23538A0A Single Hole Single-Handle Deck Mount Vessel Sink Faucet 1.2 GPM in Grohe Hard Graphite

description.en:
Sleek and sophisticated, the GROHE Essence Single-Handle Single-Hole Bathroom Faucet is a distinctive style with a gently curved swivel spout and side lever handle. The perfect size for a vessel sink, this water-saving faucet reduces water usage while providing superior performance. Available in an array of exquisite, on-trend finishes. The Essence single-handle vessel-sink bathroom faucet embodies all the elements of precision craftsmanship and design excellence.

  • SINGLE-HOLE FAUCET: Single-handle bathroom faucet can also be used on a 1- or 3-hole sink or vanity with deck plate, sold separately
  • EASY SINK CLEANING: For added convenience, the swivel spout rotates 150� or 360� to rinse every corner of the sink
  • DRIP-FREE: German engineered bathroom faucet with quality ceramic disc valve to ensure leak-proof performance
  • BRASS BODY: Solid brass spout and metal handle for durability
  • SMOOTH HANDLE OPERATION: Features GROHE SilkMove for precise handle control
  • REDUCED SPLASHING: GROHE AquaGuide allows for adjustable water flow for less splashing
  • ANTI-SCALD PROTECTION: Limits the water temperature to prevent accidental scalding
  • CONSERVES WATER: GROHE EcoJoy technology allows for less water usage without sacrificing performance
  • DURABLE FINISHES: GROHE StarLight coating maintains luster on brushed and polished finishes
  • LIMITED LIFETIME WARRANTY: GROHE warranties this bathroom faucet to be free of manufacturer defects, your assurance of quality design and performance

Reflecting the exceptional character of every GROHE design, the Eurocube Wall-Hung Bathroom Sink inspires with its sleek lines and contemporary aesthetic. Equally beautiful in an above-counter setting, the Eurocube sink pairs perfectly with the Eurocube toilet (sold separately) and specially selected GROHE faucets (sold separately). With GROHE, coordinating the elements of an elegant bathroom is an effortless way to create a space that fosters harmony and relaxation.

  • Meticulously crafted of fine fire clay with high-gloss finish
  • Coordinating shroud conceals plumbing for an unobstructed look, sold separately
  • Pairs perfectly with GROHE Allure Brilliant and GROHE Eurocube 8 in. widespread faucets, sold separately
  • Measures 19 1?16" x 5 7?16" x 24 13 ?16" (485 x 138 x 614 mm)
  • Drain assembly not included
  • Mounting kit and template included
  • Nominal Dimensions: 19-1/16" x 5-7/16" x 24-13/16"
  • Coordinated lavatory shroud (optional)

description.en:
Reflecting the exceptional character of every GROHE design, the Essence Wall-Hung Sink Shroud complements the soft lines of the Essence collection. More than an accent, the sink shroud conceals plumbing, creating a clean, unobstructed look. Made of smooth, high-gloss fine fire clay, its precise curves fit perfectly under GROHE Essence sinks for a flawless finish.

  • Designed to match Essence sinks 39668000 and 39669000
  • Smooth, glossy finish is easy to clean
  • Measures 10" x 7 11?16" x 10 1?16" (255 x 196 x 256mm)

description.en:
Reflecting the exceptional character of every GROHE design, the Essence Undermount Bathroom Sink is defined by soft curves and timeless luxury. The Essence sink is the perfect complement to today�s luxury counter tops and vanities, adding distinction with its gently curved bowl and rich luster. Complete your bathroom design with the Essence toilet (sold separately) and specially selected GROHE faucets (sold separately). With GROHE, coordinating the elements of an elegant bathroom is an effortless way to create a space that fosters harmony and relaxation.

  • Pairs perfectly with GROHE Essence, GROHE Atrio and a select array of other GROHE faucets, sold separately
  • Measures 17" x 4 7?8" x 24 7?8" (431 x 124 x 631 mm)
  • Glazed overflow included
  • Mounting kit and template included
  • Drain assembly not included
  • ADA compliant

description.en:
Elkay has been a trusted name in stainless steel since 1920. We are proud to be America's No. 1 selling kitchen sink company. In addition, we offer prep, bar, bath and laundry sinks. Elkay commercial sinks can be found in public spaces such as classrooms, office buildings, health care facilities, parks and recreation areas and more. Available in ADA depths.

  • ADA COMPLIANT: Product is ADA compliant when properly installed.
  • DROP-IN INSTALLATION: Sink is designed for drop-in installation to make the sink a focal point of your room.
  • 20-GAUGE STAINLESS STEEL: Highest grade 20-gauge thickness and Type 304 stainless steel for everyday lasting durability, performance and finish.
  • QUIET: Sound-deadening pad(s) minimizes sound and vibration for a quieter time at the sink.
  • U-CHANNEL INSTALLATION: Mounting clips placed inside the channel before installation mean less time under the sink for an easier install.
  • OFFSET DRAIN: Drain placement provides more usable space on the bottom of the sink and in the cabinet below.
  • MADE IN THE USA: This Elkay product is proudly made in the USA.
  • LAVATORY SINKS: Add style to the bath with an elegantly designed sink by Elkay.
  • DRAIN OPENING: Sink drain opening measures 1-1/2".
  • CABINET SIZE: Minimum cabinet size for this sink is 24".

description.en:
Grohe 3427000A Concetto Collection Single Hole Bathroom Faucet
  • Chrome Finish
  • Metal lever handle
  • Swivel spout - 100 degree swivel
  • Stainless steel flex lines
  • Includes waste set assembly
  • Temperature limiter
  • Flow control
  • Flow Rate 1.2 gpm
  • WaterSense compliant
The TOTO Rendezvous Oval Undermount Bathroom Sink with CeFiONtect offers a space-saving and elegant design. The Rendezvous sink features a beautiful rimless circular shape, a generously wide basin, and concealed front overflow. The Rendezvous features TOTO's CeFiONtect glaze, prohibiting mold and debris from adhering to ceramic surfaces, keeping your sink cleaner longer. The Rendezvous is ADA compliant. Features and Benefits Elegant, space-saving oval design for undermount installation CeFiONtect ceramic glaze prevents debris and mold from sticking to ceramic surfaces, leading to fewer chemicals and less water in cleaning Concealed front overflow Mounting assembly complete with installation template and mounting screw set for wood countertops ADA Compliant.

description.en:
The TOTO Promenade Rectangular Pedestal Bathroom Sink for 8 inch Center Faucets is traditionally elegant with distinctive lines. The Promenade features a spacious basin, large backsplash and rear overflow. The Promenade pedestal sink is designed in TOTO Universal Height, offering a more comfortable experience across a wide range of users.
  • Elegant, distinctive rectangular design
  • Vitreous china pedestal and sink combination complete with mounting hardware
  • Universal Height: 34" rim provides a more comfortable position across a wide range of users
  • Rear overflow
  • 8 inch center faucet holes

This wall-mount design is slender and space-saving, and will work with any bathroom space. Features a stylish deep bowl and offers a rear overflow. Includes CEFIONTECT, an extraordinarily smooth, ion-barrier surface that helps to keep the lavatory cleaner longer.
  • Mounting Hardware Included
  • CEFIONTECT Ceramic Glaze
  • Rear Overflow
  • Wall Mount Design
  • Deep Bowl

description.en:
• Rectangular basin gives a classically clean look to your bathroom countertop
  • Covered under Toto's limited 1 year warranty
  • Constructed of vitreous china providing a classic look and feel
  • Installs in a pedestal configuration - pedestal leg sold separately
  • Rear drain location increases area in the sink as well as storage underneath
  • Equipped with overflow drain � works in tandem with the primary drain to prevent an overflow or spillage
  • Includes installation hardware
  • Extra-secure mounting assembly
  • Toto bathroom sinks provide unmatched performance, durability and reliability
